title: Inc
content:

{{GAnom}}
{{Youmay|Inc, a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|Clone Lieutenant]]|the similarly named [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Ince]]}}

''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|III}}, which includes Order 66, to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Thus, the events of the webstrips, including Inc's death, must have taken place in 19 BBY.</ref>

{{Quote|Carbon flush!|Inc|<ref name="reverse">''[[Reversal of Fortune]]''</ref>}}
'''Inc''' was a [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] who fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] as a part of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]] under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]]. Early in the war, Inc participated in an [[Battle for the Galactic Republic information bunker|ambush]] against a group of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in an effort to acquire a [[Unidentified T-series tactical droid (Aayla Secura's ambush)|tactical droid's]] head and [[Robolobotomy/Legends|extract]] its information. Serving alongside fellow [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] [[Galle/Legends|Galle]] and [[Barr]], and under the leadership of Commander Bly, the group of clones were able to successfully complete their mission and acquire the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] head. Towards the war's end, Inc was assigned to a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] under the command of Jedi General [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] during a [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]]. It was there that Inc was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droid]] after his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] experienced a carbon flush.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Push 'em back! Inc, nail 'em with poppers!|Commander Bly|<ref name="head">''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]''</ref>}}
[[File:Bly-Galle-Barr-Inc.png|thumb|left|200px|Inc, alongside Galle, Bly and Barr, utilized jetpacks to ambush Separatist battle droids.]]
The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who would take on the name Inc was created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] from the [[Clone template/Legends|clone template]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to serve the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="clonedb" /> Part of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Inc was a member of the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]],<ref name="TCSWE-Inc" /> under the command of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|Bly]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]].<ref name="TCSWE-327th">{{CSWECite|III|206|327th Star Corps}}</ref> Early in the war, in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Headgames-Date">''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]'' is shown to take place after the beginning [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and is stated to have occurred some [[Time/Legends|time]] before the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' episode "[[Jedi Crash]]." Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the beginning of the Clone Wars to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 82|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part'' 82]] {{C|22 BBY 93-96: Deadly Dangers}} dates the events of "Jedi Crash" to 22 BBY as well, then ''The Clone Wars: Headgames'' must also take place during that time.</ref> the 327th [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] Inc, [[Barr]], [[Galle/Legends|Galle]], and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Bly attempted to reap information from the [[Memory bank/Legends|memory banks]] of a Separatist [[Unidentified T-series tactical droid (Aayla Secura's ambush)|tactical droid]], by setting up a trap in a [[Stone/Legends|rocky]] canyon. They were able to fabricate an [[information bunker]], which attracted the attention of the [[T-series tactical droid/Legends|T-series tactical droid]]. In turn, the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] ordered its troops to attack the bunker, prompting Inc and the men of the 327th to [[Battle for the Galactic Republic information bunker|attack]] them from the rear. Using [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]], they charged the droids and Inc was instructed by Commander Bly to throw [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|droid poppers]] at them. The clones were able to effectively dispatch the droid's troops, while Jedi General Aayla Secura beheaded the [[Tactical droid/Legends|tactical droid]]. Since the droid had not gone into [[cyberostasis]], they would be able to [[Robolobotomy/Legends|extract information]] from its memory banks.<ref name="head" />

[[File:IncGotShot.png|thumb|right|200px|Inc is killed by a dwarf spider droid.]]
In the final days of the Clone Wars, in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> the 327th fought in the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]], attempting to capture Separatist leader [[Shu Mai/Legends|Shu Mai]]. During this conflict, Inc, now holding the rank of [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|Clone Lieutenant]], was assigned to a [[Squad/Legends|squad]], along with fellow [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] Barr, to support Jedi General [[Barriss Offee/Legends|Barriss Offee]] on a trek to<ref name="reverse" /> the [[City/Legends|city]]<ref name="TCSWE-HarGau">{{CSWECite|II|19|Har Gau}}</ref> [[Har Gau/Legends|Har Gau]]. During their hike through the Felucian [[Forest/Legends|forest]], Offee, Inc, and Barr split off from the rest of the squad to scout ahead. The trio came across a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] patrol, which they proceeded to ambush before the droids could report. During the attack, Inc's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] experienced a carbon flush, rendering it inoperable. With no way of defending himself, a [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droid]] was able to close the distance to Inc and blast him, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him instantly. Shook from Inc's death, Barriss Offee ordered Barr to fall back and retrieve the rest of the squad.<ref name="reverse" />

==Personality and traits==
As a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] clone created from the genetic template of bounty hunter Jango Fett,<ref name="clonedb" /> Inc had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin<ref name="Skin" /> and stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="clonedb" />

==Equipment==
Inc wore [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]] that featured the yellow markings of the 327th Star Corps. He also carried droid poppers and utilized a jetpack and a [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]] during the mission to extract information from a tactical droid.<ref name="head" /> Later on in the war, Inc would adopt [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase II clone trooper armor]] which would continue to be adorned with the markings of the 327th. He was also equipped with a [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldron]], a [[Kama/Legends|kama]], and a [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15 blaster]] while on Felucia.<ref name="reverse" />

==Behind the scenes==
Inc first appeared in ''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'',<ref name="reverse" /> a series of daily webstrips published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']] from [[October]] [[2004]] through [[June]] [[2005]]. The webstrips were written by [[Paul Ens]] and illustrated by [[Tom Hodges]].<ref name="Hyperspace">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/episode-iii/bts/setdiary/news20050729.html|series=Episode III Set Diary|text=The Space Battle on Paper}}</ref>

==Appearances==
